thoughtSummary: Rex Dominion is confident heading into this week. He views every match as a chance to cement his dominance and expects his manager's investment to pay off.
Steel Purity is focused and determined. He believes honor wins in the end and is ready to prove it against whoever steps up.
Slick Vince is scheming. He's looking for any angle to avoid a fair fight and come out looking good without taking damage.
Iron Maddox is angry. He wants to hurt someone and doesn't much care who it is.
Dazzle King wants the spotlight. He'll do whatever it takes to get the crowd on their feet and get himself on camera.
Rookie Blaze is hungry and reckless. His recent heel turn has him feeling liberated — he's done playing by the rules.
Phantom Strike is calculating and patient. He studies opponents and waits for the perfect moment to strike.
Big Thunder Jake wants to throw someone around. He's been overlooked lately and intends to make some noise.
Nova Flash is excited. She's been on a winning streak and believes this is her moment to break through to a bigger stage.
Grim Reapers are in sync. They operate as one unit and are focused on making a statement as a team.
